word: G171 - ἀκαίρως - akaírōs - ak-ah'-ee-roce - Out of season

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀκαίρως

- Transliteration: Akairos

- Phonetic: ak-ah'-ee-roce

- Definition:

1. unseasonable

- Origin: from the same as G170

- TDNT entry: 10:42,4

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Adverb from the same as G170; inopportunely: - out of season.
